revision.content:
This is reference material for people interested in using our mill. This material is collected here in order to assist a workshop on using the mill as well as for people to teach themselves how to use this machine.

{|
| [[Image:Mill-info_diagram.png|none|thumb|300px|Mill Info Diagram]]
| [[Image:Mill_oiling_chart.png|none|thumb|300px|Mill Oiling Chart]]
|}



== Reading Material ==
This is a scan of two chapters from the book Machining Fundamentals on mills. This is a highly illustrated book with lots of different mill configurations and ways of using a mill.
* [http://www.bloominglabs.org/downloads/Machining_Fundamentals-Mill-chapters_17+18.pdf.zip Machining_Fundamentals-Mill-chapters_17+18.pdf.zip] (128MB)

Here are some scans from an older book called the "Metal Working Handbook". I recommend reading the chapter on Measuring Tools at least:
* [http://www.bloominglabs.org/downloads/MetalWorkingHandbook-MeasuringTools-chapter2.pdf.zip MetalWorkingHandbook-MeasuringTools-chapter2.pdf.zip]
* [http://www.bloominglabs.org/downloads/MetalWorkingHandbook-MillingMachines-chapter13+14.pdf.zip MetalWorkingHandbook-MillingMachines-chapter13+14.pdf.zip]



This site has some more reading material on using mills:
* [http://jjjtrain.com/vms/library.html http://jjjtrain.com/vms/library.html]


== Supplementary books ==
* [http://books.google.com/books?id=pPoNZB4xqHoC&printsec=frontcover&source=gbs_ge_summary_r&cad=0#v=onepage&q&f=false Machinery's Handbook Pocket Companion]


== Videos ==
We have a set of training videos physically in Bloominglabs for the official machining workshop.

However in the mean-time if you are waiting to take the machining workshop, these MIT training videos are a reasonable introduction to the mill. They are part of a 10 video series on machine tools, these are the lathe videos from this series. They each are about 45 minutes in length. 

* [http://techtv.mit.edu/videos/127-machine-shop-4] - MIT video 1 for the mill
* [http://techtv.mit.edu/videos/127-machine-shop-5] - MIT video 2 for the mill
* [http://techtv.mit.edu/videos/143-machine-shop-6] - MIT video 3 for the mill
* [http://techtv.mit.edu/videos/183-machine-shop-7] - MIT video 4 for the mill

* [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ip2jm_6aUyk&noredirect=1] - A good video on selecting endmills and how to determine speeds to run at

More videos:
* [http://archive.org/search.php?query=subject%3A%22Machining%22] - A listing of milling videos from archive.org


== Replacement Shop Posters and Oiling Charts ==
Each machine tool station should have a poster board with a detailed oiling chart for the machine and a decimal/millimeter conversion chart among posters. If a machine tool like the lathe or mill is missing necessary posters they should all be available from the [[Signage]] page/category on this wiki for re-printing. 


[[Category:Training]]
